_comment: Single source of truth for agent→extraction_type mapping. Consumed by rollup normalization (Tracks 1.D, 2.B) and the Level-1 crosswalk (Track 3.D). Do not hard-code these relationships elsewhere. See C-7 in docs/extraction_run_corrections_eng.md.
_table_note: Clause-level agents write to the 'extractions' table. Bill-level agents write to 'bill_level_extractions'. The triage agent labels passages in-place (no extractions row).

obligation.disambiguation: payload-driven: presence of penalty/enforcement fields → enforcement; effective_date fields → timeline; otherwise → obligation

definition_actor.disambiguation: payload-driven: actor list present → actor_mapping; framework_ref list present → framework_ref; otherwise → definition
definition_actor.name_note: agent name 'definition_actor' maps to extraction_type 'definition' (and variants); the two names differ by design

threshold_exception.disambiguation: payload-driven: threshold_sub_type='exemption' or exceptions list present → exception; otherwise → threshold
threshold_exception.name_note: one agent produces two distinct extraction_type values

applicability_agent.note: Structured JSONB payload; no ExtractionType enum value. Feeds Tracks 1.H (law_category), 2.C (ai_system_types_in_scope), 2.D (covered_sectors).

enforcement_agent.note: Bill-level enforcement structure. Primary structured source for enforcement_status (supersedes the 15 clause-level 'enforcement' extractions). See C-8 enforcement sparsity discussion.

compliance_timeline_agent.note: Bill-level effective dates and compliance deadlines.

triage.note: Labels each passage relevant/uncertain/not_relevant. Passages marked not_relevant skip the 6-agent clause battery entirely.

ambiguity.note: Ambiguity findings are now embedded as interpretation_risks fields on obligation and rights_protection payloads. The ExtractionType.ambiguity enum value remains for legacy row compatibility only.

consumers_to_migrate._note: These files currently hard-code agent/type relationships and should be migrated to consume this file when redesign Tracks 1.D and 2.B begin.

src/core/payload_adapter.py.pattern: ADAPTER_MAP dict keyed by extraction_type strings including actor_mapping, framework_ref, exception, enforcement sub-types

src/ingestion/extractor.py.pattern: AGENT_EXTRACTION_TYPES dict — this is the authoritative runtime source; this lookup file mirrors it for the normalization loader and non-Python consumers
